# Endpoint → Permission Map (GENERATED — do not edit by hand)

> Regenerated by `RbacAuthMapTests`. Source = live `EndpointDataSource`.
> Sprint 13k Plan 2 (RBAC Cartesian audit). Reflects the running gate on each route.

## Summary

| Kind | Count |
|---|---:|
| Anonymous | 6 |
| AuthnOnly | 13 |
| Perm | 232 |
| Assertion | 5 |
| ApiKeyOnly | 26 |
| Unprotected | 0 |
| **TOTAL** | **282** |
